rules.label: Accessible Route – Clear Width
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §402.2 – Accessible routes shall have a minimum clear width of 36 in. Passing spaces of 60 in. × 60 in. are required every 200 ft where route is < 60 in. wide.
rules.remediation: Increase accessible route width to minimum 36 in. clear. Where the route cannot achieve 60 in. wide, provide 60 × 60 in. passing spaces at intervals not exceeding 200 ft.

rules.label: Turning Space – 60-Inch Diameter Circle
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §304.3 – Turning spaces shall comply with either a 60 in. diameter circular space or a T-shaped space with 36 in. wide legs and 60 in. clearance.
rules.remediation: Provide a 60-in. diameter turning space in each accessible room, toilet room, and at the end of each accessible corridor. Alternatively, provide a T-shaped turning space per §304.3.2.

rules.label: Accessible Door – Clear Width
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §404.2.3 – Doorways shall provide a clear opening of not less than 32 in. measured between the face of the door and the opposite stop, with the door open 90°.
rules.remediation: Replace door and/or frame to achieve minimum 32 in. clear opening width at 90° door position. Consider offset hinges or wider door units to achieve compliance.

rules.label: Door Maneuvering Clearance
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §404.2.4 – Maneuvering clearances shall be provided at each side of the door: front approach/latch side: 18 in. min; depth at push side: 12 in. for doors with closers and latches.
rules.remediation: Provide adequate maneuvering clearance at accessible doors. Front latch-side approach requires 18 in. minimum clearance beyond the latch. Recess doors or relocate adjacent walls/fixtures.

rules.label: Ramp Slope
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §405.2 – Ramp running slope shall not exceed 1:12 (8.33%). Cross slope shall not exceed 1:48 (2.08%). Minimum clear width 36 in.
rules.remediation: Redesign ramp to achieve maximum 1:12 running slope and 1:48 cross slope. If the grade change cannot be accommodated at 1:12, provide an elevator or platform lift.

rules.label: Ramp Edge Protection
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §405.9 – Ramps shall have edge protection: a curb or barrier to prevent slip-off on each side not bounded by a wall or guardrail. Minimum curb height 4 in.
rules.remediation: Install 4-in. minimum curb on each open side of the ramp. Alternatively, extend the ramp surface beyond the edge or install a rail system that prevents a cane from slipping off.

rules.label: Accessible Parking Spaces – Count
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §208.2 / §502.2 – Number of accessible parking spaces per Table 208.2. 1 van-accessible space required per 6 accessible spaces.
rules.remediation: Provide the required number of accessible parking spaces per ADA Table 208.2, including the required proportion of van-accessible spaces (min 8 ft wide access aisle, 11 ft wide stall).

rules.label: Accessible Parking – Stall Dimensions
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §502.2 – Car accessible stall: 96 in. wide minimum. Van accessible stall: 132 in. wide minimum OR stall 96 in. wide with 96-in. access aisle.
rules.remediation: Restripe accessible parking to meet minimum stall dimensions. Car stalls: 96 in. wide with 60-in. access aisle. Van stalls: 132 in. wide with 60-in. aisle OR 96-in. wide with 96-in. aisle.

rules.label: Toilet Room – Turning Space
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §603.2.1 – Toilet rooms shall have a turning space complying with §304: a 60-in. diameter circle or T-shaped space. The turning space shall be within the toilet room.
rules.remediation: Reconfigure toilet room layout to provide a 60-in. diameter turning space entirely within the room (not overlapping with the door swing).

rules.label: Toilet Clearance
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §604.3 – Clearance around water closets: 60 in. on the transfer side (side approach), 48 in. in front. Toilet centerline: 16–18 in. from side wall.
rules.remediation: Reconfigure toilet room to provide 60-in. clear width on the transfer side and 48-in. clear depth in front of the toilet. Position toilet centerline 16–18 in. from the side wall.

rules.label: Forward Reach Range
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §308.2 – Forward reach: 15–48 in. AFF without obstruction. With obstruction ≤ 34 in. high, forward reach: 15–48 in. AFF.
rules.remediation: Relocate or adjust controls, dispensers, and other operable components to fall within the 15–48 in. forward reach range above finish floor.

rules.label: Handrail Gripping Surface
rules.citation: ADA 2010 §505.4 – Handrail gripping surfaces shall have a circular cross section 1.25–2 in. in diameter, or non-circular with perimeter 4–6.25 in. and max cross-section 2.25 in. Clearance from wall: 1.5 in. min.
rules.remediation: Replace handrail to meet ADA gripping surface requirements. Install round profile rails 1.25–2 in. diameter with minimum 1.5-in. clear space between rail and wall/brackets.
